about.title: About CheckReel
about.content:
CheckReel is a project by Alwafer Media — a full-service studio for account management, AI-based website and app development, and data-driven marketing campaigns.

What you get: Instant media checking, simple correction tips, and a free trial for three files.
Why CheckReel matters: Protect your brand, save hours of work, and avoid warnings and bans.
